sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37355" key="e)ciate/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξῑ-ᾱτέον</orth>, <sense id="n37355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must heal,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν ἕλκωσιν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.36</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
